debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_starts_in_1 :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.startsIn1Condition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
⊢ u ≠ v

proof:
(by
        intro h_eq
        have h_u_has_var : ∃ symbol ∈ u, Sum.isLeft symbol := by
          have dstep_var_in_u : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by
            have h_dstep_sound := dstep.sound
            simp at h_dstep_sound
            simp [h_dstep_sound, Word.mem_mul_iff_or]
            apply Or.inl; apply Or.inr; tauto
          exists (Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs)
        have h_v_has_no_var : ¬ ∃ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isLeft symbol := by
          rw [exhaustiveCondition] at h_exhaustive
          apply not_exists_of_forall_not
          intro symbol
          have h_s_e := h_exhaustive symbol
          rw [Decidable.not_and_iff_not_or_not']
          by_cases symbol ∈ v
          case pos h_pos =>
            apply h_s_e at h_pos
            apply Or.inr
            simp [h_pos]
          case neg h_neg =>
            apply Or.inl
            exact h_neg
        rw [h_eq] at h_u_has_var
        contradiction)
failed_attempts:
(by
        intro h_eq
        rw [exhaustiveCondition] at h_exhaustive
        have h_var_in_u : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by
          have h_sound := dstep.sound
          simp at h_sound
          simp [h_sound, Word.mem_mul_iff_or]
          apply Or.inl; apply Or.inr; tauto
        rw [h_eq] at h_var_in_u
        have h_is_right := h_exhaustive (Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs) h_var_in_u
        simp at h_is_right)

(by
        intro h_eq
        have h_var_in_u : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by

        rw [exhaustiveCondition] at h_exhaustive
        have h_is_right := h_exhaustive (Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs) h_var_in_u

          apply Or.inl; apply Or.inr; tauto
        rw [h_eq] at h_var_in_u
        rw [h_constructor, exhaustiveCondition] at h_exhaustive
        have h_is_right := h_exhaustive (Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs) h_var_in_u

(by

          apply Or.inl; apply Or.inr; tauto
        have h_all_right : ∀ symbol ∈ v, Sum.isRight symbol := by
          rw [h_constructor, exhaustiveCondition] at h_exhaustive
          exact h_exhaustive
        rw [h_eq] at h_var_in_u
        have h_contra := h_all_right (Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs) h_var_in_u
